2167220.name: The Bible
2167220.description:
A digital recreation of The Bible featuring these eight translations:
Protestant - KJV, WEB, ASV, Young's Literal Translation, Darby Translation, and Reina Valera-Antigua.
Catholic - Douay-Rheims 1899 American Edition & Biblia Sacra Vulgata
WEB translation features a full length audiobook accompaniment (Read by Winfred W. Henson.)


TRIVIA (Featuring 1,799 Unique Questions!) - Features a trivia game with two kinds of Quizzes. General knowledge Quizzes covering topics from the Old and New Testament; and Book Review Quizzes. Book Review Quizzes each cover a specific book of The Bible, and are meant to be taken after a user has read that book in its entirety and feels they have a strong grasp of it.
Trivia contains its own systems for tracking scores, records, and prizes for players seeking a challenging, but rewarding player experience.

Bible Search - Users can search any word or phrase and find anywhere it appears in any translation and be provided with a link to each chapter it appears in where the word or phrase will be highlighted. (USERS CAN FILTER RESULTS BY TRANSLATION.)

Bookmark any page or passage for reference when reading or studying any translation.

Enjoy a complimentary original soundtrack, or shut it off in the preferences menu if you prefer quiet study. Additional songs and soundtrack customization options to be featured soon in an upcoming update.

Check out the 'About' menu to find out where to follow us for updates, future projects, and more!
2167220.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
